creator: chriskl@familyhealth.com.au
text:
KMerlin is an IM (instant messaging) client for the MSN messenger network.

Features include:

A buddy list on which you can block users, multiple chat windows,
 and multiple users per chat (simply invite those you want in your
 chat session).
Keep in touch with all your Windows friends!

WWW: http://kmerlin.olsd.de/

Please note - this port supercedes the old net/kmsn and net/libkmsn.  These old ports need to be removed, or left with a messages pointing to KMerlin.

SHAR BELOW
----------

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	kmerlin
#	kmerlin/Makefile
#	kmerlin/distinfo
#	kmerlin/pkg-comment
#	kmerlin/pkg-descr
#	kmerlin/pkg-plist
#
echo c - kmerlin
mkdir -p kmerlin > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kmerlin/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kmerlin/Makefile << 'END-of-kmerlin/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	kmerlin
X# Date created:				Monday October 15, 2001
X# Whom:					Chris Kings-Lynne (chriskl@familyhealth.com.au)
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	kmerlin
XPORTVERSION=	0.3.1
XCATEGORIES=	net kde
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	kmsn
X
XMAINTAINER=	chriskl@familyhealth.com.au
X
XINSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
X
XUSE_KDELIBS_VER=2
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XMAKE_ENV+=	${CONFIGURE_ENV}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-kmerlin/Makefile
echo x - kmerlin/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >kmerlin/distinfo << 'END-of-kmerlin/distinfo'
XMD5 (kmerlin-0.3.1.tar.gz) = 5dbc5a3b5242dc24f29a578ec3288a0f
END-of-kmerlin/distinfo
echo x - kmerlin/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >kmerlin/pkg-comment << 'END-of-kmerlin/pkg-comment'
XAn MSN instant messaging client for KDE
END-of-kmerlin/pkg-comment
echo x - kmerlin/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >kmerlin/pkg-descr << 'END-of-kmerlin/pkg-descr'
XKMerlin is an IM (instant messaging) client for the MSN messenger network.
X
XFeatures include:
X
XA buddy list on which you can block users, multiple chat windows,
X and multiple users per chat (simply invite those you want in your
X chat session).
XKeep in touch with all your Windows friends! 
X
XWWW: http://kmerlin.olsd.de/
END-of-kmerlin/pkg-descr
echo x - kmerlin/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >kmerlin/pkg-plist << 'END-of-kmerlin/pkg-plist'

END-of-kmerlin/pkg-plist
exit
